creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On CURRENT (r299171) installation of port net/samba44 fails due to the error shown below:

[...]
* installing bin/default/source4/torture/man/locktest.1 as /usr/ports/net/samba44/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/locktest.1
Waf: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/samba44/work/samba-4.4.3/bin'
'install' finished successfully (2m40.607s)
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/net/samba44/work/README.FreeBSD /usr/ports/net/samba44/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/samba44
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===>   Installing ldconfig configuration file
===>  Installing for samba44-4.4.3
===>   Registering installation for samba44-4.4.3
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/net/samba44/work/stage/usr/local/lib/shared-modules/service/smb.so: No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/net/samba44
*** Error code 1
